review_summary.college_name: Sharavathi Dental College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty, good placements as of 2024, fair infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Our batch only had 54 students, but considering it was the 2020 batch, we were the least in number due to COVID. But other batches have more than 70 members each. It costs around 1.5 Lacs per year for a government-allotted seat through NEET, around 3.5 Lacs for a NEET-allotted private seat, and around 4.5 Lacs for management seats. Most people go for PG NEET to complete their Masters, open their own clinics, or work in different clinics. All passed-out students get a year of internship in the adjoining Sharavathi Dental Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of course facilities is good, with many working dental chairs. Everything is divided into different departments to get proper training in each. The hostel could be better and I mean a lot better. The washrooms, after weekends, have a lot of insects, but on weekdays, they're hygienic and clean. The food could do a lot better in taste, but health-wise, it's not bad.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Since it is a dental college, there are no companies hiring students, so there are no placements. Here, a student, after completing his graduation, can start his own clinic or prepare for higher studies. Unlike other courses like engineering, there are no companies hiring students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is present along with the hospital and students get good clinical exposure. There are classrooms, labs, etc. In the third floor, these are well maintained and kept. We have a huge central library. The quality of hostel facility is satisfactory; our hostel has 32 rooms, well-maintained toilets and batch rooms and is under cctv surveillance. Food available in the canteen is also good but the major problem here is the sanitation. The college also supports sports and other events and also have good medical facilities .

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Normal infrastructure but good faculties.

content.Placements: Students scored well marks in exams and almost all students pass every year. If we study well and prepare for NEET - UG, we get better colleges for future studies and to get government jobs. Otherwise, we need to set up our own clinic to serve people, like in villages.
content.Infrastructure: The college is good, classrooms and labs are also good. The hostel is better for study; it's also good but the canteen food is not good. In the hostel, a single room is shared by 2 persons and there is no attached bathroom, but we have sufficient bathrooms to use. There are no difficulties in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Concise review of Sharavati Dental College and Hospital.

content.Placements: It's not like engineering colleges where we receive placement offers; instead, an internship is compulsory for everyone, and a decent stipend of 2000 INR is paid to interns per month. It is less, but compared to other private institutions, at least we are not doing it for free.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is beautiful and well maintained by the authorities. We have a very good hospital with a high patient flow. The classrooms are spacious, with respective practical labs equipped with necessary tools. A central library is also present, housing almost all relevant books. The hostel facility is good; it is well maintained hygienically, and the mess food is good at times.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions, Datia offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Whereas, at PG level, Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions, Datia offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Pharma and PG Diploma. Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions, Datia fee structure for all the courses is around INR 38,000 to 1,10,000.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Toppers, Microsoft, Tech Mahindra, and Byju's are the top recruiting companies. About 60% of students got internships in Toppers company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are so cool and clean. The best instruments are available in the lab. The quality of food is very good in our canteen.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable. They are well-behaved. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult. If you have to study properly, you can easily clear the semester exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Shri Rawatpura Sarkar Institutions.

review_content.Placements: It is a good college but needs a lot of improvement in placements and facilities. Our college was working on it. Small companies recruited students of our college with an average salary package of 3.2 LPA. The highest salary package offered in CS was 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility was provided at a far place which is not convenient. Hostel life was good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were new and well-qualified but needed to work a lot to improve. The course curriculum was fully organised by RGPV, so the subjects were run by them. Our college followed the same procedure as every college in Madhya Pradesh.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: Few students are placed; some students are placed only through self-study or hard work; if you rely on a college, you will never get a job, and some companies hire but pay a very low salary, so think twice before enrolling in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very poor, Wi-Fi is not good, speeds are very low, and there are many network issues in classrooms, even though our data is not working well. Labs are also not good. There is a library, but it is mostly closed and all books are old. It is also not good in canteens; not all of the food that is mentioned there is available, and the quality is very poor.

content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility was provided at a far place which is not convenient. Hostel life was good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were new and well-qualified but needed to work a lot to improve. The course curriculum was fully organised by RGPV, so the subjects were run by them. Our college followed the same procedure as every college in Madhya Pradesh.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is a very good college.

content.Placements: Few students are placed; some students are placed only through self-study or hard work; if you rely on a college, you will never get a job, and some companies hire but pay a very low salary, so think twice before enrolling in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very poor, Wi-Fi is not good, speeds are very low, and there are many network issues in classrooms, even though our data is not working well. Labs are also not good. There is a library, but it is mostly closed and all books are old. It is also not good in canteens; not all of the food that is mentioned there is available, and the quality is very poor.
